chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-6123 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on Misc. No.2295/2024 3. For order on Misc. No.29249/2023 4. For order on Misc. No.28611/2023 5. For hearing of main case 24.9.2025 None present for the petitioners -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2023. Since 2023, despite two dates of hearing, none has ever put in appearance for the petitioners. Today, once again, despite lapse of one and a half years, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
